en: My wife is from Ohio, man. She's Irish, she's white, she's blue eyes, blonde hair.
We went to a birthday party in Ohio with her family, man. It was different from my family.
It was like a culture shock, you know, like that was the first party I ever went to that ended,
Like they were waving bye at people, I was still eating.
Everybody showed up with enough gas to go home.
Nobody left a baby behind to go to the club.
That was the first party I ever been to that when I got to the party,
nobody from the party sent us to go get something for the party.
